headline: Charles Schwab Expands Into Direct Crypto Trading And Client Engagement
summary: Charles Schwab has introduced direct Bitcoin and Ethereum trading for brokerage clients through Schwab Crypto. The launch expands Schwab's digital asset offering beyond ETFs and futures into direct spot trading. A phased rollout with a client waitlist is now live, with initial coverage focused on Bitcoin and Ethereum. For investors watching NYSE:SCHW, the move into direct crypto trading comes as the stock trades at $92.99, with a 34.4% return over the past year and 87.9% over three years...
